user.title: Sign in to Delta
user.description: Pick the provider you use to sign in to the DFC@Home app.

code.title: Paste your Delta sign-in code
code.description:
1. Open this link and sign in: {login_url}
2. After signing in, you'll be redirected to a `justaddwater://` URL that your browser can't open — this is expected.
   - **Firefox:** Open the Network tab before clicking sign in. Find the failed redirect request and copy the `Location` response header — it starts with `justaddwater://`.
   - **Chrome:** Open DevTools Console (right-click → Inspect → Console) before signing in. After sign in, find the line containing `justaddwater://?code=delta.code.XXXXX`.
3. Paste the full URL or just the `delta.code.XXXXX` part below.

data.code: Delta sign-in code or full redirect URL

device.title: Select your faucet
device.description: Multiple VoiceIQ devices were found on this account. Pick the one to add.

error.invalid_code: That code was rejected by Delta. It may be expired or already used — sign in again to get a fresh one.
error.cannot_connect: Could not complete sign-in with Delta. Check the Home Assistant logs for details and try again.

abort.no_devices_found: No VoiceIQ devices were found on this Delta account.

exp_unparseable.title: Delta faucet token expiry could not be determined
exp_unparseable.description: Home Assistant could not read the expiration date from your Delta access token. Check the Home Assistant logs for details — this usually means Delta changed its token format.

expiring_soon.title: Delta faucet token expires soon
expiring_soon.description: Your Delta faucet access token expires in {days} days. Go to Settings → Devices & Services and reauthenticate to refresh it.
